overall.description: A first-person walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city at night, featuring the distinctive aesthetic of Cyberpunk 2077. The player moves from a wet city street up illuminated stairs into a neon-lit pedestrian plaza with palm trees and massive cylindrical digital billboards. The environment features towering skyscrapers, holographic advertisements, reflective wet surfaces, and sparse pedestrian NPCs.

scene_state.functional_zone: wet city street with concrete barriers and neon billboards

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk next to an empty multi-lane street with concrete barriers

entered.detail: yellow and white striped concrete barriers lining the sidewalk edge
reflective wet multi-lane road with yellow dividing lines
large illuminated advertising screen on distant building facade
tall dark building with grid-patterned windows rising in the background
tall pole with bright linear LED light fixture

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wet cyberpunk city street at night. The camera moves forward along a concrete sidewalk bordered by striped concrete barriers on the right and an empty multi-lane street on the left. Neon digital billboards and towering glass skyscrapers dominate the distant view, while street lamps cast bright linear light onto the reflective wet surfaces.

scene_state.functional_zone: street crossing and illuminated stairway entrance

events.description: crosses the empty multi-lane street toward the security gates
begins ascending the wide concrete stairs with embedded lighting

agents.ego_description: crosses the empty street and approaches the illuminated stairs, ascending toward the upper plaza

entered.detail: futuristic vertical slat barriers with glowing green lights
wide staircase with warm orange LED strip lighting along each step edge
building entrance with bright cyan neon signage reading 'Sky'

segments.scene_description: The camera crosses the empty wet street and passes through futuristic metal security gates. It then ascends a wide concrete stairway illuminated by warm orange LED strips embedded in each step. A neon-lit storefront with cyan signage becomes visible on the left as the camera climbs toward an upper pedestrian plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian plaza with palm trees and digital displays

events.description: exits stairway into open plaza with palm trees and marble flooring
turns left to walk along the curved digital screen wall

agents.ego_description: walking through the upper plaza observing the neon billboards and passing by scattered pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian standing near plaza furniture looking at phone
pedestrian walking away from camera toward the stairs

entered.detail: tropical palm trees in large illuminated concrete planters
reflective polished stone tiles covering the plaza surface
building facade covered in multiple angled digital billboards displaying advertisements
tall circular building wrapped in multiple levels of glowing digital screens

segments.scene_description: Emerging onto an elevated plaza with polished marble flooring, the camera moves through an open area dotted with palm trees in illuminated planters. A massive curved wall of digital screens dominates the left side while a cylindrical advertising tower rises in the center distance. Sparse pedestrian NPCs are visible, including one standing near benches and another walking away toward the stairs.

scene_state.functional_zone: central plaza dominated by cylindrical advertising structure

events.description: circles around the base of the cylindrical advertising tower

agents.ego_description: circulating around the plaza to view the multi-level advertisements on the cylindrical building from different angles

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking across the plaza toward the street level

entered.detail: bright yellow concrete blocks with graffiti markings lining the plaza edge
pedestrian bridge connecting buildings above the plaza level
ground floor commercial spaces with illuminated signage beneath the billboards

segments.scene_description: The camera circles around the central plaza, approaching the massive cylindrical building covered in rotating digital advertisements. Yellow concrete barriers appear on the left side as the camera moves past the palm trees. The perspective shifts to show different angles of the towering cylindrical screen structure and the surrounding neon-lit architecture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a rain-slicked city street up into a vibrant, neon-lit elevated plaza. It begins by moving along a concrete sidewalk bordered by striped barriers, where street lamps cast linear light across reflective wet surfaces beneath towering glass skyscrapers. As the camera crosses the empty street and passes through metal security gates, the scene shifts upward along a wide concrete stairway illuminated by warm orange LED strips and cyan storefront signage. The perspective then opens onto a polished marble plaza dotted with palm trees in glowing planters, moving past sparse pedestrians toward a massive curved wall of digital screens. Finally, the camera circles the central area, gliding past yellow concrete barriers to reveal the full scale of a towering cylindrical building covered in rotating digital advertisements.
